title: Calculating Higher Order Transition Probabilities in Markov Chains
description: A flowchart demonstrating how to compute the probability of transitioning from state i to state j in exactly n steps using the transition matrix and the Chapman-Kolmogorov equations.
relationships: P^(n)_ij is calculated by raising the transition matrix P to the nth power
The (i, j) entry of the resulting matrix P^n gives the probability of moving from state i to state j in n steps
This process utilizes matrix multiplication and the Chapman-Kolmogorov equations which state that P^(m+n)_ij = Σ_k P^(m)_ik * P^(n)_kj
